name: aurora-listbox
title: Aurora Listbox
author: jmagar <https://github.com/jmagar>
description: Shared Aurora listbox, group, and option row primitives for command palettes, search results, and combobox menus.
docs:
Aurora component that expects `aurora-tokens` to be installed first.

Default install target: `@ui/aurora/listbox.tsx`.

Registry dependencies: `aurora-tokens`, `aurora-button`.
